summary: All seven requirements are substantially implemented. The diff shows a complete single-page React application with Navigation, Hero, VenueHighlights, Contact, and Footer components, all using the specified wedding theme, correct WhatsApp URLs, Google Maps embed, and business details. One minor concern: the footer's WhatsApp link is declared in Footer.tsx but the file is truncated, making it difficult to fully confirm the exact URL rendering; however, the constant WHATSAPP_URL is set correctly. All other requirements are clearly met.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication infrastructure (useInternetIdentity hook, useActor hook, InternetIdentityProvider, QueryClient) is included in the project
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states no user authentication or login is required and this is a purely static frontend application. The inclusion of @dfinity/auth-client, InternetIdentityProvider, and actor management hooks was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking added in the footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking in the footer, which was not part of any requirement.
